package rulecoverage

func NegativeFindinbatchesCandidateForLargeScan() string {
    ruleID := "findinbatches_candidate_for_large_scan"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Unbounded result sets that could use FindInBatches or cursor iteration."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
